channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Vehicle strikes pedestrians in Oakland, killing 3
item.description: The driver and several others were injured, according to the Oakland Fire Department.

item.title: Man with dual identity linked to crimes from Monaco to New Mexico
item.description: A man faces forgery and larceny charges in New Mexico, and was convicted of plotting to kill his ex-wife. Decades earlier, a fire in...

item.title: National BBQ Month heats up with grilling tips
item.description: Virgil's Real BBQ pit boss Michael Conlon joins ABC News Live to share grilling tips for National BBQ Month.

item.title: At least 4 killed in Russia by Ukrainian drone strikes
item.description: Russian defenses shot down 81 drones headed for Moscow overnight, state agency Tass reported, citing Sobyanin.
